sn1.51:1.1: “What is good all the way through old age?
sn1.51:1.3: What is the treasure of human beings?
sn1.51:1.4: What can’t be stolen by thieves?”
sn1.51:2.1: The Buddha: “Virtue is good all the way through old age.
sn1.51:2.3: Discernment is the treasure of human beings.
sn1.51:2.4: Merit can’t be stolen by thieves.”
